Legal

T-MOBILE TRIAL

Try us out yourself for FREE.

This isn't just a network test drive. Get access to the Best Mobile Network in the U.S., with satellite coverage, member benefits, and the full T-Mobile experience, all free for 30 days. No credit card. No credit check. And no commitment.

Get started in the T-Life app

Qualifying non-T-Mobile network user & compatible, unlocked device req’d. 1/user. Best Mobile Network in the US according to Ookla® Speedtest®. See 5G device, coverage, & trial details at T-Mobile.com.

This is what better looks like.

Experience America’s Best Mobile Network for yourself.

Experience T-Mobile, awarded America's Best Network by Ookla® Speedtest®. See how we stack up against your current carrier, where you live, work, and play, then switch with confidence when you're ready.

Qualifying non-T-Mobile network user & compatible, unlocked device req’d. 1/user. See 5G device, coverage, & trial details at T-Mobile.com.

From off-the-grid
to online.

T-Satellite keeps you connected virtually anywhere by powering texts, voice chat via WhatsApp, and essential apps in places no carrier tower can reach. Included on our Experience Beyond plan, or try our free 30-day trial.

Qualifying non-T-Mobile network user & compatible, unlocked device required for 30 day trial. 1/user. See 5G device, coverage, & trial details at T-Mobile.com. T-Satellite: Texting & select satellite-ready apps with compatible device in most outdoor areas in the U.S. where you can see the sky. Satellite service, including text to 911, may be delayed, limited, or unavailable.

Your phone. Our magic.
And no worries.

We make it easy—you’ll keep your phone and your current carrier during the trial. If you switch, we’ll give you a great deal on a new phone or help pay off your current device.

Benefits you
actually want.

Enjoy unlimited talk, text, and premium data. Plus, member benefits like weekly perks with T-Mobile Tuesdays and more FREE for 30 days, even before you switch.

Qualifying non-T-Mobile network user & compatible, unlocked device req’d. 1/user. Activate up to 4K UHD streaming on capable device, or video typically streams in SD.  See 5G device, coverage, & trial details at T-Mobile.com.

Got iPhone with AT&T?

Did you know they may have locked your phone? Don’t worry—we won’t let them get in the way of a good thing.

Not with AT&T? We can help you find out if your device is unlocked and compatible.

Check device status

Ready to get started? Download the T-Life app.

You'll just need a valid email and phone number to sign up. If you haven’t already, be sure to check that your device is unlocked and eSIM-compatible.

Qualifying non-T-Mobile network user and compatible, unlocked device required. 1 trial per user.

Millions have switched already. Put us to the test.

THIS IS WHAT BETTER FEELS LIKE

Get value that lasts.

Over the past five years, T-Mobile families saved big money versus Verizon and AT&T.

Switch to T-Mobile and we’ll even pay off your current phone, up to $800/line.

Switch and save
Millions: Based on T-Mobile 2025 net customer additions across postpaid and broadband. Based on HarrisX Billing Snapshots.

T-Mobile members get some of the best benefits in wireless.

STREAM YOUR FAVORITES
$107/yr value

Netflix On Us.

Learn more
While you maintain one qualifying Experience Beyond or Experience More line in good standing. Compatible device required. Activate up to 4K UHD streaming on capable device, or video typically streams in SD. 
APPLE TV
$119/yr value

MLS, Formula 1®, and Friday Night Baseball, plus hundreds of Apple Originals.

Sign up now
Apple TV just $3/mo. with Experience More or Experience Beyond plan.
JUNE IS MEMBER MONTH

All month long, we’re turning up what it means to be with T-Mobile.

Check out our perks
Switch to T-Mobile and start enjoying your perks today.
HILTON HOTEL BRANDS

15% off at Hilton brands worldwide.

Learn more
Deposit & Hilton Honors™ Membership required for 15% discount.
T-MOBILE TICKETS

Get 25% off tickets to the hottest shows.

Get T-Mobile Tickets
8000+ shows. 120+ venues. All over the country. Tickets available on a first-come, first-served basis while supplies last. Max 4 tickets/Passcode.
DOLLAR CAR RENTAL

Return your rental car without refueling it.

Learn more
T-MOBILE TUESDAYS

Free perks. Epic prizes. Favorite brands. Every week.

Check it out
Limited time. Qualifying plan required. Visit T‑Mobile Tuesdays in the T-Life app for details.

SCAM SHIELD

Scam Shield

Try us out yourself for FREE.

Limited-time; subject to change. 5G device required to access 5G network. Data available for 30 days. Active non-T-Mobile service required; your carrier's terms also apply. You may need to upgrade your device when you switch to get full coverage. Coverage not available in some areas. Activate up to 4K UHD streaming on capable device, or video typically streams in SD. Up to 250GB high-speed mobile hotspot data then unlimited on our network at max 3G speeds. Best Mobile Network based on analysis by Ookla of Speedtest Intelligence® data 2H 2025. Ookla trademarks used under license and reprinted with permission. See 5G device, coverage, & access details at T-Mobile.com. Review Network Management Policies and Terms and Conditions (including arbitration provision) at T-Mobile.com for additional information.

AT&T typically takes 24-48 hours to respond. Then, finish setting up your free trial inside the T-Life app.

Step 1

Download the T-Life app.

Step 2

Start the process for your free 30-day trial.

Step 3

When prompted, select “How do I unlock my phone?”

Step 4

Select “Start AT&T unlock.”

Step 5

Find your IMEI number. Here’s how.

Step 6

Submit your unlock request.

Got Questions?

  • T-Mobile Trial (formerly Network Pass) allows you to try our network free for 30 days, while keeping your existing phone and carrier. All you need is an unlocked, eligible eSIM-capable phone, and to download the T-Life app from the Apple App Store or Google Play store. Then you can experience unlimited high-speed data, T-Satellite on optimized phones, and some of our favorite benefits all with your own phone, phone number, and apps. A list of eligible phones can be found here.

  • Non-T-Mobile customers that have not previously participated in T-Mobile Trial or Network Pass within the past 12 months and meet the following criteria:

    • Have an eligible, unlocked phone with available eSIM and be located in the U.S. or Puerto Rico; a list of eligible phones can be found here
    • Weren't a T-Mobile or Metro by T-Mobile customer or customer of partners using the T-Mobile network within the past 90 days

  • No, T-Mobile Trial is a risk-free and cost-free way to try T-Mobile. No credit check or credit card information is needed to get started, and once you hit 30 days of use it will automatically end.

  • There's no cost to you and no catch. Just download the T-Life app and complete the setup on your phone. Then you can try T-Mobile's network and member benefits for free for 30 days. Use your own phone and keep your existing phone number and service with your current carrier. There is a limit of 1 T-Mobile trial per user.

  • T-Mobile Trial allows you to try the T-Mobile network on your own phone by activating T-Mobile as a secondary provider on your phone using eSIM technology. Your T-Mobile Trial plan is active for up to 30 days, and includes unlimited high-speed data that won’t slow down based on how much data you use. You'll experience the award-winning T-Mobile network while keeping your current plan and phone number with your primary cellular provider, so you’ll never miss a call or text. Both plans will appear in your phone’s cellular settings, and you'll see two network signal bars on your phone—one for T-Mobile, and one for your current provider.

  • Yes!  You will sign up using your personal information but identify yourself as a business customer. 

  • Yes. With T-Mobile Trial, all your calls and texts will continue to come in on your current provider, while all your data uses the T-Mobile network. You will also have your temporary T-Mobile number available as a secondary voice number, so you can try calling and texting on our network as well.

  • 5G access is available to any phone that has 5G capabilities. Make sure your 5G phone is operating on the latest operating system to access T-Mobile's 5G network.

Hello! Want to stay logged in?

To keep your accounts safe, you'll be automatically logged out in: 

Share your screen while on a call or in store

Get guided support from an Expert in real time

  • For your security, personal info, tabs, and notifications are automatically hidden.
  • You can stop screen sharing at any time.
  • Experts can only see what’s on T-Mobile.com.
  • Don’t use screen share while driving or in any situation where it's unsafe to focus on your screen.

By clicking 'Accept and continue,' you are consenting to allow the Expert to view your screen for assisted navigation. This session may be recorded. To learn more, please visit the  T-Mobile Privacy Notice.

Next: Generate a code to share with your Expert

Share this code with your Expert

code

Once your code has been successfully entered by your Expert, this window will close and continue to the session.

Allow screen sharing with your Expert?

Personal and sensitive data is hidden for your security and privacy.

End your session?

Ending your session will stop sharing your screen, but will not end your call.

Your session has ended

Your screen is no longer being shared with your Expert.

You are already in an active session

Your code has expired

Generate a new one to share with your Expert.
